name: Microsoft Defender for Containers not enabled on registry
description: Microsoft Defender for Containers is not enabled for this Container Registry. Without Defender, container images are not scanned for OS and application vulnerabilities, and runtime threat detection is unavailable.
remediation: Enable Microsoft Defender for Containers at the subscription level in Microsoft Defender for Cloud. This automatically enables vulnerability scanning for all registries in the subscription. Review scan findings and remediate vulnerable base images.
